C

Cell - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.model
Represents a single cell in the Sudoku board.
Cell(int, int) - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Constructs a Cell with its absolute grid coordinates.
CellInputAdapter - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.controller.cellInputHandler
Adapter for ICellInputListener providing empty default implementations.
CellInputAdapter() - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.controller.cellInputHandler.CellInputAdapter
 
CellInputHandler - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.controller.cellInputHandler
Concrete input handler.
CellInputHandler(BoardManager, CellInputHandler.CellInputCallback) - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.controller.cellInputHandler.CellInputHandler
 
CellInputHandler.CellInputCallback - Interface in com.bifasico.soduko.controller.cellInputHandler
Callback implemented by the controller.
CELLS_PER_REGION - Static variable in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
 
clear() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.SudokuStack
Removes all elements from the stack.
clearGuess() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Resets the player's guess and marked state for this cell.
clearSelection() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
Clears selection state (selected row/col/digit).
com.bifasico.soduko - module com.bifasico.soduko
 
com.bifasico.soduko - package com.bifasico.soduko

com.bifasico.soduko.model - package com.bifasico.soduko.model
 
com.bifasico.soduko.view - package com.bifasico.soduko.view
 
containsValue(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns whether a given value (1-6) is already present in this region's solution values.
containsValueInColumn(int, int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns whether a given value appears in any cell of this region that shares the given column.
containsValueInRow(int, int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns whether a given value appears in any cell of this region that shares the given row.
CORRECT - Enum constant in enum class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView.CellState
 
countCorrectlyPlaced(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.BoardManager
Returns how many times the given digit value appears correctly placed on the board.
